job.title: Graduate AI Engineer
job.raw_description: Graduate AI Engineer at Earth AI

missing_skills: Earth AI domain-specific knowledge (geospatial AI, climate modeling, or satellite data processing - if applicable to role)
Specific Earth science or environmental domain expertise
match.reasons: This is an exceptional match for a Graduate AI Engineer role. Rudra is an ideal candidate for this position: (1) Perfect seniority alignment - he is a recent Master's graduate targeting entry-level AI roles, which matches the graduate-level position exactly; (2) Comprehensive technical foundation - he demonstrates expertise across the full ML/AI stack including Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, and modern ML practices; (3) Production experience - he has deployed two production AI systems (PersonaQuery, HealthEcho) with live deployments, which is impressive for an entry-level candidate and demonstrates practical engineering skills beyond theory; (4) Advanced AI/ML capabilities - proficiency in LLMs, RAG systems, prompt engineering, and multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Azure, Anthropic, Groq) shows he's current with cutting-edge generative AI; (5) Full-stack competency - end-to-end capability from data handling (SQL, Pandas, NumPy) through model development to deployment (FastAPI, Docker, cloud platforms); (6) Academic credibility - Master's degree from a recognized institution, published researcher with IEEE Best Paper Award, and patent holder demonstrates intellectual rigor; (7) Location and flexibility - based in Sydney, NSW matching the job location, and open to remote/hybrid. The only minor gap is lack of domain-specific Earth AI expertise (geospatial, climate, satellite data), but this is typically not expected for graduate-level hires and can be learned on the job. His strong fundamentals and proven ability to learn complex systems quickly make this very manageable.
